page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Confinement-Free Wide-Field Ratiometric Tracking of Single Fluorescent Molecules.

A software for single particle tracking which includes intensity ratiometric measurements and analysis.

Unpack the zip file to a folder of your choice.

follow the instructions in the manual in order to get started
